ItacWorkItem.ShortTitle: Caroli Wittestein seu a Petra Alba
ItacWorkItem.LongTitle: Serenissimae Margaritae ab Austria, Medici, Disceptatio Philosophica de quinta Chemicorum Essentia. Accessit Alexandri Carerii Patavini Quaestio An metalla artis beneficio permutari possint
ItacWorkItem.Notes: According to Tomasini, Elogia, Cariero delivered this lesson in the Accademia degli Animosi.
ItacWorkItem.CensorsAgreement: Cum gratia et privilegio Caes. Maiest.

Essay.EssayTitle: Alexandri Carerii Patavini Questio An arte metalla permutari possint

ItacWorkItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
